calendar.matters: APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818

HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES
Off Calendar Jan-13-2010 Denied

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-11-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Default Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Daniel Bornstein, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Alfonso Lopez, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Stephanie Gonzales.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on December 29, 2009.

Exhibit--1--Rental Agreement, dated 11/28/09------------------------------------------ID/EVID
Exhibit--2--3 Day Notice to Pay Rent or Quit, dated December 7, 2009------------------ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Alfonso Lopez, and against the default defendant Stephanie Gonzales as follows:

Past-Due Rent - $2,350.00.
Holdover Damages - $861.63.
Attorney Fees - $0.00.
Costs - To Be Determined Pursuant to Cost Memorandum.
Total - $3,211.63.

Additionally, plaintiff Alfonso Lopez is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 916 Capp Street, San Francisco, CA. The lease is forfeited.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-11-2010 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-07-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 218, Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha; Not Reported.

Daniel Bornstein, Esq. for and present with the Plaintiff Alfonso Lopez.
